About.title: About Me
About.summary: A dedicated and detail-oriented Web Developer with a solid foundation in building modern, full-stack applications. Proficient in Next.js and React, with a strong understanding of database design and API development. Eager to contribute to a collaborative development team.
About.p1: I am a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) student specializing in modern JavaScript/TypeScript technologies, with professional experience constructing performant and dynamic web application services.
About.p2: Whether it is building frontend solutions with React and Next.js, or writing server architectures using Node.js and SQL/NoSQL databases, I strive to design applications that are accessible, maintainable, and scalable.
